news.headline: Predictive Oncology closes direct offering, sells 363,336 shares at $1.50 per share, raising funds.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on February 19, 2025, Predictive Oncology Inc. (NASDAQ: POAI) successfully completed a registered direct offering. The offering consisted of the purchase and sale of 363,336 shares of common stock at a price of $1.50 per share, following Nasdaq rules for pricing at-the-market. Predictive Oncology, a notable player in AI-driven drug discovery and biologics, finalized this transaction to raise funding for its operations.

news.headline: Asbury Automotive Group appoints Daniel E. Clara as COO, effective Feb 17, 2025. Clara has 23 years of experience.
news.summary: In Duluth, Georgia, the Board of Directors of Asbury Automotive Group, Inc. (NYSE: ABG) revealed the promotion of Daniel E. Clara to Chief Operating Officer on February 17, 2025. With more than 23 years in the automotive retail sector, Clara previously served as Senior Vice President of Operations for 5 years. Asbury Automotive Group, Inc. is a prominent automotive retail and service company in the U.S.

news.headline: Osisko posts record 2024 revenue of US$191.2M and cash flows of US$159.9M. Provides 2025 guidance and 5-year outlook.
news.summary: An all-time high annual revenue was reported at $191.2 million, alongside a landmark operational cash flow of $159.9 million.

news.headline: Hershey prices $2 billion worth of notes with varying interest rates and due dates in 2028, 2030, 2032, and 2035.
news.summary: Hershey, headquartered in Hershey, Pennsylvania, disclosed the details of its recent offering on Feb. 19, 2025, through a press release. The Hershey Company, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol HSY, shared that it successfully priced a total of $2 billion in notes. The offering included $500 million in 4.550% notes maturing in 2028, $500 million in 4.750% notes maturing in 2030, $500 million in 4.950% notes maturing in 2032, and $500 million in 5% notes with the maturity date undisclosed.

news.headline: Platinum Sees 1H Turnaround Costs A$9.5m to A$10m Pre Tax
Zurn Elkay Water Solutions marks 125th anniversary with 2024 Sustainability Report, reducing energy intensity by 23%.
news.summary: In Milwaukee, Zurn Elkay Water Solutions (NYSE: ZWS) launched its 125th anniversary year by unveiling the 2024 Sustainability Report. The report showcases Zurn Elkay’s efforts in tackling vital water issues and enhancing operational sustainability, with advancements made towards achieving its 16 timebound objectives. One significant achievement includes a 23% decrease in energy intensity from its 2021 baseline, exceeding the targeted 15% reduction.

news.headline: RBNZ Governor: Economic shock needed to cut by 50 basis points
New Gold reports strong Q4, full year 2024 results with all-in sustaining costs below guidance & positive free cash flow.
news.summary: Rigorous cost management has resulted in All-In Sustaining Costs performing better than the lower limit of expectations, contributing to a robust quarter of free cash flow for New Gold Inc. In the period ending February 19, 2025, the company demonstrated impressive financial performance, with all amounts reported in U.S. dollars unless specified otherwise.

news.headline: Colabor Group Inc. (TSX: GCL) to release Q4 and fiscal year 2024 results on Feb 25, 2025, with conference call on Feb 26 at 9:30 am ET.
news.summary: SAINT-BRUNO-DE-MONTARVILLE, Quebec, Feb. 19, 2025 - Colabor Group Inc. will announce its fourth quarter and fiscal year results for the period ending December 28, 2024, on February 25, 2025, after the market closes. Investors can join the conference call to review these results on February 26, 2025, at 9:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The Company's trading symbol on the Toronto Stock Exchange is GCL.

news.headline: General Aviation contributes $339B to US economy, supports 1.3M jobs - GAMA-sponsored Study
news.summary: New study sponsored by the General Aviation Manufacturers Association reveals that the general aviation industry supports 1.3 million jobs and contributes $339 billion to the U.S. economy. Released on February 19, 2025, the study highlights the substantial impact of the industry on the country's economic output.

news.headline: Veracyte, Inc. (Nasdaq: VCYT) to attend investor conferences in FL: Raymond James on March 5th and Leerink Partners on March 11th.
news.summary: Veracyte, Inc., a prominent cancer diagnostics company listed on Nasdaq as VCYT, disclosed its upcoming participation in key investor conferences. These include the Raymond James 46th Annual Institutional Investors Conference in Orlando, FL, with a presentation scheduled for March 5th at 9:50 a.m. Eastern Time, and the Leerink Partners Global Healthcare Conference in Miami, FL, where a fireside chat is set for March 11th at 8:40 a.m. Eastern Time. The company's presentations will be accessible through live audio webcasts.

news.headline: Latest data on industrials sector and industry performance, for more details visit Bloomberg.
Covenant Clearinghouse in Austin donates to community organizations, funds support various groups nationwide in 2024.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on February 19, 2025, Covenant Clearinghouse, the leading servicer of real estate assessments in the nation, revealed its charitable contributions at the end of 2024. These donations will benefit numerous community-driven organizations nationwide. Among them is CASA (Court Appointed Special Advocates), a key recipient that aids abused and neglected children in the legal system. This initiative is part of Covenant Clearinghouse’s ongoing commitment to social responsibility, with an emphasis on supporting causes that positively impact local communities.

news.headline: Triple Flag reported record 2024 results with 40% YoY increase in operating cash flow, declaring US$0.055 dividend per share.
news.summary: Triple Flag Precious Metals Corp. disclosed its performance for Q4 and full year 2024, alongside a declared dividend of US$0.055 per common share, to be distributed on March 14, 2025. The company, listed on TSX as TFPM and NYSE as TFPM, reported its 8th successive year of record GEOs in 2024, leading to a nearly 40% rise in operating cash flow per share compared to the previous year. The figures presented are in US dollars, unless specified otherwise.

news.headline: Nigeria files $81.5B lawsuit against Binance over economic damage and tax non-payment after hostage crisis.
news.summary: Nigerian authorities are pursuing damages amounting to billions of dollars following claims that Binance has caused harm to the country's economy and neglected tax obligations.

news.headline: Pan American Silver reports record revenue, cash flow from operations, and free cash flow in 2024. Conference call scheduled for February 20.
news.summary: Vancouver-based Pan American Silver Corp. (NYSE: PAAS) (TSX: PAAS) has released its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024 (Q4 2024) and the audited financial results for the year ending December 31, 2024 (FY 2024). The company also shared its projections for production, costs, and expenditures in 2025 through the "2025 Operating Outlook." Pan American will hold a conference call and webcast on February 20 to discuss these results and outlook.

news.headline: Triple Flag declares dividend of US$0.055/share for Q1 2025 to be paid out on March 14, 2025, to shareholders.
news.summary: In Toronto, Triple Flag Precious Metals Corp., trading as TFPM on the TSX and NYSE, has declared a cash dividend of US$0.055 per common share. The payment is set for March 14, 2025, for shareholders of record as of March 3, 2025. Triple Flag is a company specializing in precious metals streaming and royalty services, providing financing solutions.

news.headline: internal revenue service to cut approximately 6,700 probationary employees thursday: source
Heidmar and MGO Global merge, trading as "HMR" on Nasdaq Capital Market starting Feb 20, 2025.
news.summary: Tomorrow morning, February 20, 2025, the shipping company Heidmar will begin trading on The Nasdaq Capital Market under the ticker symbol "HMR." This move is anticipated to bring increased visibility and accessibility to investors looking to capitalize on Heidmar's performance in the industry.

news.headline: Covenant Clearinghouse hires constitutional expert Allyson Ho from Gibson Dunn; Ho is co-chair of the Appellate and Constitutional Law practice group.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on February 19, 2025, Covenant Clearinghouse shared the news of retaining Allyson Ho from Gibson, Dunn & Crutcher's Dallas office. Ho, a partner and co-chair of the national Appellate and Constitutional Law practice group, is a significant addition to the team.

news.headline: Covenant Clearinghouse recruits Matthew T. Kennedy from Texas AG's office, boosting their team expertise. (Word count: 11)
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on February 19, 2025, Covenant Clearinghouse revealed that Matthew T. Kennedy, ex-Deputy Chief of the Consumer Protection Division at the Texas Office of Attorney General, has recently joined their team. Covenant Clearinghouse is recognized as the foremost servicer of real estate assessments in the country.

news.headline: Manulife's Board declares dividends on non-cumulative preferred shares, payable on or after March 19.
news.summary: Manulife Financial Corporation, under the tickers TSX/NYSE/PSE: MFC and SEHK: 945, disclosed today in Toronto that its Board of Directors has declared quarterly dividends for preferred shares. The dividends are for non-cumulative preferred shares, and are slated to be paid on or after March 19, 2025.

news.headline: Covenant Clearinghouse in Austin, TX, adds attorney Emily Young to legal team with over a decade of experience.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on February 19, 2025, Covenant Clearinghouse, the leading servicer of real estate assessments in the US, welcomed litigation attorney Emily Young to their growing in-house legal department. Young brings more than ten years of expertise in commercial law to the team, further strengthening Covenant Clearinghouse's legal capabilities.

news.headline: Manulife boosts common shareholders' dividend by 10% to $0.44 per share. Stock prices: TSX/NYSE/PSE: MFC SEHK: 945.
news.summary: Manulife's Board of Directors, based in Toronto, revealed an uptick of 10.0% equivalent to 4 cents per share for its quarterly common shareholders' dividend, bringing the dividend to $0.44 per share. The company's shares are listed as TSX/NYSE/PSE: MFC and SEHK: 945. This adjustment was announced on February 19, 2025.

news.headline: Manulife filed 2024 audited financials for year ended Dec 31, 2024; listed on TSX/NYSE/PSE: MFC, SEHK: 945.
news.summary: Manulife Financial Corporation, trading as MFC on TSX/NYSE/PSE and 945 on SEHK, has submitted its audited annual financial statements for 2024 ending on December 31. The documents were filed with securities regulators, including those in Canada.

news.headline: OceanaGold exceeded 2024 production goals, with $192M net profit and $245M free cash flow, doubling annual dividend.
news.summary: Met 2024 has recently announced updated production guidance along with achieving a record annual production at the Haile site. The company reported a remarkable annual Net Profit of $192 million and Free Cash Flow of $245 million. Additionally, they have decided to double their annual dividend and are planning to repurchase a significant amount of shares.

news.headline: COVU's Series A funding increased to $22M, total funding now $32M after hitting key milestones. Led by Benhamou Global Ventures.
news.summary: In San Francisco, COVU, a prominent player in insurance customer management and risk advisory utilizing artificial intelligence, has revealed an increase in its Series A funding to $22 million. This comes after attaining significant milestones, pushing their total funding to $32 million. Initially intended as a milestone-centric funding approach, the high investor interest led to a $10 million expansion, resulting in oversubscription. Benhamou Global Ventures (BGV), the primary investor in COVU’s initiative, led this funding round.

news.headline: Nation offering citizenship for $100,000 amid climate concerns. Learn more at Bloomberg.
LivePerson (Nasdaq: LPSN) will report Q4 2024 results on March 5, 2025, after market close.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, LivePerson, Inc. revealed plans to unveil its fourth quarter financial results post-market closing on Wednesday. LivePerson, Inc., a prominent provider of enterprise conversational AI and digital transformation solutions, operates under the Nasdaq ticker symbol LPSN. The company's upcoming financial report is highly anticipated by investors and analysts, with key figures expected to provide insights into LivePerson's performance during the last quarter of the fiscal year. Stay tuned for more details following the release of LivePerson's financial results.

news.headline: OceanaGold reports Mineral Reserves and Resources for 2024, showing an increase. TSX: OGC, OTCQX: OCANF.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 19, 2025, OceanaGold Corporation (TSX: OGC) (OTCQX: OCANF) announced its Mineral Reserves and Mineral Resources ("R&R") statement for the year ending December 31, 2024. The company reported an increase in Mineral Reserves, with specific numbers not disclosed in the paraphrased content.

news.headline: In 9 months, Inevitable Games Fund, backed by Immutable, grew by 180% due to high user demand in web3 gaming.
news.summary: The Inevitable Games Fund has recently revealed its initial returns reflecting the thriving nature of web3 gaming, showcasing impressive resilience, growth, and a significant surge in user demand. Immutable, working alongside King River Capital and Polygon Labs, disclosed the first returns on liquid investments from this collaboration in New York on February 19, 2025. This highlights the robust performance and potential of the sector, with the investment showing positive outcomes for the stakeholders involved.

news.headline: Rollins, Inc. priced $500M of 5.25% Senior Notes due 2035. Offering to close on Feb 24, 2025, subject to conditions.
news.summary: Atlanta-based Rollins, Inc. (NYSE: ROL) disclosed the pricing of $500 million in aggregate principal amount of its 5.25% Senior Notes due 2035. The offering is set to conclude on February 24, 2025, pending certain conditions.

news.headline: GoDaddy Inc. (NYSE: GDDY) CEOs to speak at Morgan Stanley Conference in San Francisco on March 3, 2025.
news.summary: The CEO, Aman Bhutani, and CFO, Mark McCaffrey, of GoDaddy Inc. (NYSE: GDDY) will be speaking at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on March 3, 2025, in San Francisco, California at 12:15 PM.

news.headline: Manulife Financial Corp. reported strong full year and fourth quarter 2024 results with record core earnings and 30%+ increases.
news.summary: Manulife Financial Corporation ("Manulife" or the "Company") announced impressive financial results for the full year and fourth quarter ending on December 31, 2024. The company reported record core earnings with a remarkable increase of over 30%. The stock prices on the TSX, NYSE, and PSE markets for Manulife are indicated as C$, unless stated otherwise. The strong performance indicates a prosperous year for Manulife.

news.headline: Manulife plans to buy back up to 51.5 million of its shares through Normal Course Issuer Bid.
news.summary: Manulife Financial Corporation, under the symbols TSX/NYSE/PSE: MFC SEHK: 945, based in Toronto, disclosed plans on Feb. 19, 2025, to initiate a Normal Course Issuer Bid (NCIB) allowing for the buyback and cancellation of approximately 51.5 million of its outstanding shares.

news.headline: Oceaneering reports Q4 2024 results: Revenue $713M (+9%), Operating income $77.9M (+64%), Net income $56.1M (+26%)
news.summary: Houston - Oceaneering International, Inc. ("Oceaneering") (NYSE:OII) has released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. In the fourth quarter of 2024, the company reported a revenue of $713 million, marking a 9% increase compared to the previous year. Operating income saw a significant boost, reaching $77.9 million, representing a 64% increase year over year. Net income for the same period was $56.1 million, reflecting a 26% increase year over year. Adjusted EBITDA also experienced growth, reaching $102 million, a 35% increase year over year. Additionally, cash flow provided by operating activities amounted to $128 million with free cash flow totaling $94.5 million.

news.headline: NamSys Inc. reports fiscal 2024 results, elects Nicole Sparks as Non-Executive Chair. All in CAD.
news.summary: In Toronto on February 19, 2025, NamSys Inc. disclosed its financial performance for the fiscal year along with the appointment of Nicole Sparks as the Non-Executive Chair of the Board of Directors. NamSys Inc. is a prominent company on the TSX-V exchange (CTZ), specializing in cash processing and transportation technology. All figures mentioned are denoted in Canadian dollars.

news.headline: Fed's Jefferson: Path back to 2% inflation could be bumpy.
Fed's Jefferson: Some households are more stretched on financial front.
Fed's Jefferson: Some household may face challenges weathering financial shocks.
Fed's Jefferson: Fed rate cuts are lowering real-world borrowing costs.
Alamos Gold announces record $272 million free cash flow in Q4 and year-end 2024 results, driven by production and margins.
news.summary: A surge in production levels and significant growth in profit margins have resulted in a record free cash flow of $272 million. This boost in cash flow has enabled the company to fund high-return projects aimed at driving further growth.

news.headline: Dundee Precious Metals finds wide high-grade intercepts at Dumitru Potok; includes 190m at 2.07% Cu, 1.23 g/t Au, and 12.19 g/t Ag. Accelerating drilling campaign.
news.summary: In Toronto on February 19, 2025, Dundee Precious Metals Inc. (TSX: DPM) provided an update on their exploration activities. The company announced significant drill intercepts at the Dumitru Potok prospect in Čoka Rakita, showcasing high grades of copper, gold, and silver. Due to these promising results, DPM has decided to expedite their drilling campaign in order to further define the potential of these rich zones. Additionally, they shared positive outcomes from Rakita North and early findings from the newly identified Valja Saka target, situated on the Čoka Rakita and Potaj Čuka licences, respectively. These prospects are strategically located near the planned infrastructure for the Čoka Rakita project.

news.headline: Ferroglobe releases financial results for Q4 and full year 2024, showcasing significant numbers.
Fastly CFO to speak at Morgan Stanley Conference on March 4; webcast available on their Investor Relations website.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Fastly, Inc. (NYSE: FSLY), a leading global edge cloud platform company, disclosed that its CFO, Ron Kisling, is set to engage in a fireside chat at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference in San Francisco on March 4, 2025, at 4:50 p.m. PT. Interested individuals can view a webcast of this session on Fastly’s Investor Relations website at https://investors.fastly.com. Fastly, Inc. provides a robust and customizable edge cloud platform designed to enhance online content delivery efficiency.

news.headline: Fed’s Jefferson: The Fed rate cuts are lowering real-world borrowing costs.
Fed's Jefferson: US labor market is solid and inflation has eased but still elevated.
Fed's Jefferson: US monetary policy remains restrictive.
Fed's Jefferson: Household balance sheets appear in good shape.
ROHM introduces TVS diodes for high-speed CAN FD in vehicles, low capacitance design, high surge current rating.
news.summary: A newly designed low-capacitance system aims to prevent signal degradation in automotive electronic devices. The system boasts a high surge current rating, ensuring enhanced protection for these devices. This design feature is critical as it helps maintain signal integrity in the face of potential electrical disturbances. The improved low-capacitance setup helps safeguard automotive electronics by offering protection against surges, making it a valuable asset for maintaining optimal performance and durability.
